news.t: How IFLO and GRIN Bring FCF Discipline to International Markets
The ETF Growth Spurt: Looking Past the S&P 500 Giants
Victory Capital Expands VictoryShares® Offerings with Three New ETFs

holdings.infoBox: IFLO is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Kioxia Holdings stock at 6.25%, Shell at 2.96%, International Consolidated Airlines Group at 2.58%, Sanofi at 2.46%, and Publicis Groupe at 2.21%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares International Free Cash Flow ETF (IFLO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is passively managed to track an index of stocks from developed countries outside of the US. Companies are screened based on fundamental criteria, selecting, and weighting the top 100 names based on free cash flow yield and growth prospects IFLO was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Victory International Free Cash Flow Index - Benchmark Price Return

data.title: Victory Capital Expands VictoryShares® Offerings with Three New ETFs
data.text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $VCTR--Victory Capital launches 3 ETFs: Pioneer Asset-Based Income (ABI), International Free Cash Flow (IFLO), International Free Cash Flow Growth (GRIN).
